spec_match.rationale: Correctly creates three concurrent summarizer calls with differing length constraints.

interactive.rationale: Users can paste any custom content and watch the concurrent streams update, complete with clear stat counters.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligns with the progressive AI abstraction of the API.

edge_cases.rationale: Heuristic streams are correctly random-delayed so the progressive layout works perfectly.

references.rationale: Mentions the Chrome Summarizer docs and ChromeStatus entry.

design_system.rationale: Gorgeous three-column grid with custom status borders indicating active streaming vs completed state.

summary: Highly impressive interactive UI featuring concurrent streaming generators side-by-side for short, medium, and long options.
